trivia: The largest of the CJ light jets adds a swept wing borrowed from bigger Citations. It became the default owner-flown serious jet: fast, efficient and everywhere.
CJ4s connect small airports directly, so they enrich a Fleet with airfields airliners never touch.
funFacts: Swept wing derived from the Citation Sovereign.
Still single-pilot certified despite its size.
